prompt: Make the chord pads sustain for 2 bars instead of 1 bar per chord.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p 2w 2w
    n [48 52 55]

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

sec chorus

    n 36

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI correctly attempted to change the chord pad durations to 2 bars.
judgment.quality_reason: Using '2w' may not be valid syntax for a 2-bar sustained note (typically 'w^w' or '1^1' is used), but the intent to double the duration is clear.
